ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor from which the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in hPa */,
  "light" INTEGER /* Light intensity in lux */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" INTEGER /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, external API) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., BME280, BH1750FVI) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Geographical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor for which the alert is configured */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_email" TEXT /* Email address to notify when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action to be taken when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor to which the summary relates */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded for the day */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity recorded for the day */,
  "mean_pressure" REAL /* Mean pressure recorded for the day */,
  "mean_light" REAL /* Mean light intensity recorded for the day */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date for which the summary is generated */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity recorded for the day */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity recorded for the day */,
  "min_pressure" REAL /* Minimum pressure recorded for the day */,
  "max_pressure" REAL /* Maximum pressure recorded for the day */,
  "min_light" REAL /* Minimum light intensity recorded for the day */,
  "max_light" REAL /* Maximum light intensity recorded for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_summary_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor type */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor type */,
  "serial_number_prefix" TEXT /* Prefix used for serial numbers of this sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry related to the quality check */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is valid */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the data is invalid */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report generated */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report (e.g., researchers, stakeholders) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_reports_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification was sent */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
